metadata.name: Multi-Environment Feature-Flag Deployment
metadata.purpose: Universal deployment orchestrator with progressive feature rollout across alpha, beta, staging, and production environments
metadata.author: Infrastructure Team

executiveSummary.description: Feature flag-controlled deployment system supporting 4 environments with progressive rollout strategy and comprehensive health validation. Orchestrates NX monorepo builds, Docker Compose deployments, and automated health checks with rollback safety.
keyChanges: Deployment record tracking with feature flag state
prerequisites: Docker Compose files for target environment

alpha.description: Alpha environment with all experimental features enabled
alpha.purpose: Test all experimental features in isolated environment

beta.description: Beta environment with stable features enabled
beta.purpose: Test stable features before staging promotion

production.description: Production environment with only proven stable features
production.purpose: Serve production traffic with stable features only

FF_MCP_SERVER.name: MCP Server Integration
FF_MCP_SERVER.description: Enable Model Context Protocol server for AI agent capabilities

FF_SEMANTIC_SEARCH.name: Semantic Search with Vector Database
FF_SEMANTIC_SEARCH.description: Enable Qdrant vector search for BIM elements and documentation

FF_NEW_IFC.name: Next-Generation IFC Processor
FF_NEW_IFC.description: Enable experimental IFC 4.3 parser with enhanced geometry extraction

FF_ENHANCED_CACHING.name: Enhanced Redis Caching Strategy
FF_ENHANCED_CACHING.description: Multi-layer caching with Redis for BIM data and API responses

FF_NEW_DASHBOARD.name: Redesigned Dashboard UI
FF_NEW_DASHBOARD.description: New Material-UI based dashboard with enhanced role-based views

FF_REAL_TIME_COLLAB.name: Real-Time Collaboration
FF_REAL_TIME_COLLAB.description: WebSocket-based real-time collaboration for BIM viewing and markup

preFlightChecks.name: Validate project root directory
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure deployment is run from valid Ectropy project directory

onFailure.message: Not in a valid Ectropy project directory. Navigate to project root before deploying.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate Docker daemon running
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure Docker daemon is operational for container deployments
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Exit code 0 indicates Docker daemon is running

onFailure.message: Docker daemon is not running. Start Docker daemon before proceeding.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate pnpm package manager
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure pnpm is available for NX build orchestration
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Exit code 0 indicates pnpm is installed

onFailure.message: pnpm is not installed or not in PATH. Install pnpm before proceeding.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate curl for health checks
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure curl is available for post-deployment health validation
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Exit code 0 indicates curl is installed

onFailure.message: curl is not installed or not in PATH. Install curl for health checks.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate Docker Compose configuration
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure appropriate docker-compose file exists for target environment
preFlightChecks.validationLogic: Environment-specific or fallback compose file must exist

onFailure.message: Docker Compose file not found for environment. Verify compose file exists.

preFlightChecks.name: Validate Git repository
preFlightChecks.description: Ensure deployment is from Git repository for version tracking

onFailure.message: Not a Git repository. Deployment record will not include commit information.

phases.name: Pre-Deployment Validation
phases.description: Validate environment configuration and create safety snapshot

steps.name: Configure environment variables
steps.description: Set environment-specific NODE_ENV, feature flags, and build targets
steps.purpose: Load feature flags and configuration for target environment

onFailure.message: Failed to configure environment. Verify environment name is valid (alpha/beta/staging/production).

steps.name: Create pre-deployment snapshot
steps.description: Create rollback snapshot for non-development environments
steps.purpose: Enable rapid rollback if deployment fails

validation.criteria: Exit code 0 or snapshot script not found

onFailure.message: Failed to create pre-deployment snapshot. Deployment will continue but rollback may be slower.

phases.name: Application Build
phases.description: Build web dashboard and MCP server using NX with environment-specific configuration

steps.name: Build web dashboard
steps.description: Build React SPA frontend with NX

onFailure.message: Frontend build failed. Check NX build logs for errors.

steps.name: Build MCP server
steps.description: Build Model Context Protocol server with NX

onFailure.message: MCP server build failed. Check NX build logs for errors.

steps.name: Build additional components
steps.description: Build supporting libraries and services in parallel (staging/production only)
steps.expectedOutput: Builds completed or warnings for non-critical failures

validation.criteria: Exit code 0 or non-zero but script continues

onFailure.message: Some additional builds failed. Core components built successfully, continuing with deployment.

phases.name: Container Deployment
phases.description: Deploy containers using Docker Compose with environment-specific configuration

steps.name: Deploy containers (alpha/beta)
steps.description: Deploy development environment containers with fallback
steps.purpose: Start all containerized services for alpha or beta environment

onFailure.message: Container deployment failed. Check Docker Compose logs for errors.

steps.name: Deploy containers (staging)
steps.description: Deploy staging environment containers with strict validation
steps.purpose: Start all containerized services for staging environment

onFailure.message: Staging deployment failed. Ensure docker-compose.staging.yml exists and is valid.

steps.name: Deploy containers (production)
steps.description: Deploy production environment with blue-green strategy
steps.purpose: Start all containerized services for production environment

onFailure.message: Production deployment failed. Ensure docker-compose.production.yml exists and is valid.

phases.name: Health Validation
phases.description: Wait for services to start and validate all critical endpoints

steps.name: Wait for service startup
steps.description: Allow 30 seconds for containers to initialize
steps.purpose: Give containers time to start and initialize

steps.name: Check web dashboard health
steps.description: Validate web dashboard is responding on port 4200

onFailure.message: Web dashboard not responding. Consider rolling back deployment.

steps.name: Check MCP server health
steps.description: Validate MCP server is responding on port 3001
steps.purpose: Verify MCP agent server is operational

validation.criteria: HTTP status 200 and JSON response with status field

onFailure.message: MCP server not responding. Consider rolling back deployment.

steps.name: Check API gateway health
steps.description: Validate API gateway is responding on port 3000

onFailure.message: API gateway not responding (may not be deployed in this environment).

phases.name: Deployment Recording
phases.description: Create deployment record with feature flag state and metadata

steps.name: Create deployment record
steps.description: Generate JSON deployment record with feature flags and Git metadata
steps.purpose: Track deployment history and feature flag state for audit trail

onFailure.message: Failed to create deployment record. Deployment succeeded but tracking may be incomplete.

smokeTests.test: MCP server responds to health check

performanceThresholds.measurement: Time from docker compose up to first health check success

dataIntegrity.validation: Deployment record contains all 6 feature flags
dataIntegrity.expected: JSON file with MCP_SERVER_ENABLED, SEMANTIC_SEARCH, NEW_IFC_PROCESSING, ENHANCED_CACHING, NEW_DASHBOARD_UI, REAL_TIME_COLLABORATION

dataIntegrity.validation: Deployment record contains commit and branch information
dataIntegrity.expected: JSON file with commit and branch fields populated

triggerConditions: Health checks fail for critical services (web-dashboard or mcp-server)
Manual operator decision based on monitoring alerts
rollback.decisionMaker: DevOps engineer or automated health check monitoring

steps.name: Restore pre-deployment snapshot
steps.purpose: Restore previous working state from snapshot

steps.name: Validate rollback health
steps.purpose: Verify services are healthy after rollback

steps.name: Update deployment record to failed status
steps.purpose: Mark deployment as failed in tracking system

verification.successCriteria: All critical services responding with HTTP 200

successCriteria.validation: docker ps shows all expected containers running

successCriteria.criterion: Web dashboard responds to health check
MCP server responds to health check
API gateway responds to health check
Deployment record created with feature flags
successCriteria.validation: logs/deployments/${DEPLOYMENT_ID}.json exists and contains feature_flags object
Services with enabled feature flags are accessible and functional

supportedQueries.purpose: Retrieve feature flag settings for specific environment

supportedQueries.returns: Boolean status of feature flag by environment
supportedQueries.purpose: Check if specific feature is enabled in target environment
Get all health monitoring endpoints for environment

supportedQueries.returns: Array of deployment phases with steps

supportedQueries.purpose: Get rollback instructions for failed deployment

supportedQueries.returns: Current rollout phase for each feature flag
supportedQueries.purpose: Understand which features are in which rollout stage

decisionSupport: Recommend environment for feature testing based on flag status
Suggest rollback if health checks fail
Identify next environment in promotion pipeline
Determine if feature is ready for production based on rollout phase
Calculate deployment risk based on feature flag changes
Recommend feature flag configuration for new environment

architectureAlignment.featureFlagConfig: This runbook defines authoritative feature flag states per environment
architectureAlignment.deploymentPipeline: Defines progressive rollout: alpha → beta → staging → production

knownIssues.title: Docker Compose file fallback for alpha/beta
knownIssues.impact: Alpha and beta environments fall back to dev compose file if specific file not found
knownIssues.mitigation: Script attempts environment-specific file first, then dev file

knownIssues.title: No staging/production compose file validation
knownIssues.impact: Deployment aborts if staging or production compose file missing
knownIssues.mitigation: Pre-flight checks validate compose file existence before build
knownIssues.action: Consider adding compose file validation to pre-flight checks

knownIssues.title: Additional builds may fail without aborting
knownIssues.impact: Step 2.3 continues deployment even if some builds fail
knownIssues.mitigation: Only core components (web-dashboard and mcp-server) are required
knownIssues.action: Review which additional builds are critical and enforce their success

knownIssues.title: Health check timing may be insufficient
knownIssues.impact: 30-second startup delay may not be enough for all services
knownIssues.mitigation: Health checks have retry logic built into curl commands
knownIssues.action: Implement exponential backoff health checking instead of fixed delay

required.name: FF_MCP_SERVER
required.description: Feature flag: Enable MCP server integration

required.name: FF_SEMANTIC_SEARCH
required.description: Feature flag: Enable semantic search with Qdrant

required.name: FF_NEW_IFC
required.description: Feature flag: Enable experimental IFC 4.3 parser

required.name: FF_ENHANCED_CACHING
required.description: Feature flag: Enable multi-layer Redis caching

required.name: FF_NEW_DASHBOARD
required.description: Feature flag: Enable redesigned dashboard UI

required.name: FF_REAL_TIME_COLLAB
required.description: Feature flag: Enable real-time collaboration features

required.name: DEPLOYMENT_ID
required.description: Unique identifier for this deployment (timestamp + UUID)

deploymentRecordSchema.description: JSON schema for deployment records created in logs/deployments/

commit.description: Git commit hash at deployment time

branch.description: Git branch name at deployment time

feature_flags.description: State of all feature flags for this deployment
